name: OpenMemory
description: Long-term memory backend for OpenClaw powered by OpenMemory over HTTP.

baseUrl.description: Base URL of the OpenMemory HTTP backend.

userId.description: User ID to associate memories with.

apiKey.description: Optional API key sent as a Bearer token.

autoRecall.description: Automatically inject relevant memories before each agent run.

autoCapture.description: Automatically capture a session summary when a new session starts.

recallLimit.description: Maximum number of memories to inject per recall.

captureMaxChars.description: Maximum characters to include in a captured session summary.

storePath.description: Endpoint path for storing a memory.

deletePathTemplate.description: Endpoint path template for deleting a memory. Use {id} as the placeholder.
